original_image_tags: A vertical scan of a blank, tan-colored document cover or jacket page. The paper is aged and shows creases. The top half features a purple rubber stamp mark reading "CONFIDENTIAL" which has been crossed out with a single horizontal black line. The lower portion features a second identical "CONFIDENTIAL" stamp mark, also crossed out with a horizontal black line. To the right of the lower stamp, there is a black ink receipt stamp reading "RECEIVED / FEB 23 1950 / DP 323 MIL". There are two hole-punch marks visible on the right edge of the page.

elements.description: A single aged, brown paper page (likely the back of a document). It features two large, faded red 'CONFIDENTIAL' stamps, each crossed out with a black diagonal line. At the bottom right, there is a faint circular ink stamp containing the legible word 'RECEIVED' and the date 'FEB 23 1956'. Two hole-punch marks are visible on the right edge.
